title: Expansion-agent ADR-005 conformance (5 agent files + rule item 13/11)
objective: Bring the five 3D/UI expansion-pack agent definitions into roster conformance (frontmatter permissionMode/memory/(isolation for producers)/Skill tool; verbatim ADR-005 ledger or gate protocol sections; allowed-paths discipline line; requested-status vocabulary) and neutralize .claude/rules/3d-ui-expansion.md defects D2/D5 (qualify item 13 continuation order with owner-review + G0 contracting condition; map item 11 gate names to the G0-G7 catalog). Domain content of the agents preserved; raw-pack commits d25d2b2/c0769ae remain untouched history (hash evidence).
business_reason: Owner decision 2026-07-17: disposition A requires the five agents be genuinely blocked or fully conformant before remote main exposure; G5 corrections 1-5 route here; closes B-007 at acceptance
inputs: G5 report project-control/reports/M0-T010-G5-agent-governance-review.md: required corrections 1-5 verbatim (frontmatter, protocol sections per cloud-architect.md producers / security-reviewer.md reviewer pattern, allowed-paths line, requested-status vocabulary, item 13 qualification, item 11 gate mapping, task-ID re-key rule)

Conformant roster baselines: .claude/agents/cloud-architect.md (producer pattern), .claude/agents/security-reviewer.md and code-reviewer.md (reviewer pattern), .claude/rules/project-control.md (ADR-005)

Owner decision 2026-07-17: raw-pack commits preserved as hash evidence; conformance edits are NEW commits; final remote-main HEAD must carry agents fully conformant AND hook-enforced (B-007/agent_dispatch_guard.py); B-007 closes only at this task's acceptance
Enforcement already on main @ e18cea1: B-007, counter-notice rules file, PreToolUse guard, tools/test_agent_dispatch_guard.py in CI
outputs: The 5 agent files edited in place: frontmatter permissionMode: default + memory: project (+ isolation: worktree for the 4 producers) + Skill in tools (+ Write and skills: run-quality-gate for visual-quality-reviewer); verbatim ADR-005 'Ledger and integration protocol' (producers) / 'Gate reporting protocol' (visual-quality-reviewer, with unconditional read-only language replacing the 'during final review' qualifier); 'Stay within allowed paths' line in producers; 3d-massing-engineer completion wording aligned to awaiting_gate|blocked|needs_split; ALL domain content preserved

.claude/rules/3d-ui-expansion.md: item 13 qualified ('...continue from the first unblocked task after the owner has reviewed the integration report and the orchestrator has contracted the work through the normal G0 process'); item 11 gate names mapped to the G0-G7 catalog (evidence requirements within G3/G4, not a parallel gate system)
forbidden_paths: .claude/hooks/**, .claude/settings.json, .claude/rules/expansion-agent-dispatch-hold.md (enforcement layer - orchestrator only), project-control/blockers/**, tools/**, .github/**, docs/**, services/**, apps/**, packages/**, all other .claude/agents/*.md
acceptance_scenarios: S1: each of the 5 files parses (YAML frontmatter) and carries permissionMode: default, memory: project, Skill in tools; the 4 producers carry isolation: worktree; visual-quality-reviewer carries Write + run-quality-gate skill

S2: producers embed the verbatim roster 'Ledger and integration protocol (ADR-005)' section; visual-quality-reviewer embeds the verbatim 'Gate reporting protocol (ADR-005)' with UNCONDITIONAL read-only language (no temporal qualifier)
S3: rule item 13 no longer instructs unqualified continuation (owner-review + G0 condition present); item 11 gate names mapped to G0-G7; no other rule content changed
S4: domain content of all 5 agents preserved (diff shows additive/qualifying edits only; no capability or scope-of-expertise text removed)
S5: python tools/test_agent_dispatch_guard.py still 15/15 (enforcement layer untouched); secret scan + contracts validator exit 0 (true exit codes)
S6: raw-pack commits d25d2b2/c0769ae unchanged in history (no rebase/amend); conformance edits are new commits on the task branch
execution_location: text-only edits in worktree .claude/worktrees/M0-T013 on branch task/M0-T013-agent-conformance (branched from local post-merge main so the pack files exist); KB-scale; disk 16.7 GB free
